decisions.rationale: DS-01 AC-2 commits to all 71 styles.json keys; partial ir_refs sample is traceability polish. Generate bubble-styles.css from full slice at implement — not a decompose rewrite.
DS-05/DS-06 partition bTIRW by region with ACs naming header/mode elements; expand ui_refs from ir/inventory.json element_definitions/bTIRa subtree during implement per ui-fidelity rubric.
AC-cited reflection/plugin nodes (bTIzX, bTIzY, bTJBC, bTJBI) missing from ui_refs; add at DS-04 implement without changing item boundaries.

summary: Review ok (88% readiness); 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance decompose: full styles migration on DS-01 implement, deepen ui_refs on DS-04/DS-05/DS-06 at implement.
